title: Terraria Fishing Crates
description: Wooden, Iron, and Gold fishing crates from Terraria!
body:
Terraria Wooden, Iron, and Gold fishing crates ported to Minecraft! Currently only for Neoforge 1.21 and 1.21.1!

40% chance to fish up a Wooden Crate alongside treasure! 20% for iron and 15% for gold!

There is a small chance of getting a Reaver Shark, Sawtooth Shark, or Falcon blade form Iron and Gold crates! They are slightly more efficient than netherite tools and sword!

NO AI WAS USED IN THE MAKING OF THIS MOD
